allow: Bash(gh pr create --title 'Extend Azure FinOps reference: rightsizing, AKS, databases, governance, storage, networking, FOCUS' --body ' *)

PowerShell($current = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); $target = "C:\\Users\\jlati\\.local\\bin"; if \($current -split ";" -contains $target\) { "Already present in User PATH - no change made." } else { $sep = if \($current.EndsWith\(";"\) -or [string]::IsNullOrEmpty\($current\)\) { "" } else { ";" }; $new = $current + $sep + $target; [Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable\("Path", $new, "User"\); "Added '$target' to User PATH." }; "---"; "Current User PATH entries:"; [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\) -split ";" | ForEach-Object { " - $_" })
